ddt:Target.Name: TCU_AIVC_v2.8
ddt:Target.Description: ******************** HISTORY ******************** V2.0 03/08/2016 : Creation and compliance with DTS V2.6 Draft V2.5 17/02/2017 : Creation, Updation and comliance with DTS V2.8.1 for SW5 version V2.6 06/04/2017 : Creation,Updation and compliance with DTS V2.9.1 V2.7 05/05/2017 : Creation,Updation and compliance with DTS V2.9.1 for SW6 V2.8 02/06/2017 : Updation and compliance with DTS V2.9.1 for SW7

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Lost communication with Body Control Module
Lost communication with Airbag Control Unit
Lost communication with Electronic Control Moteur
Lost communication with Electronic Stability Control
Lost communication with Hand Free Module
Lost communication with Hybrid Electric Vehicle Control
Lost communication with Electric Powered Steering
Remote Actuator service activated without ciphering key
Lost communication with Underhood Switching Module
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_SMSfallback.Request_From
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - SMS fallback number: REQUEST FROM

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_SMSfallback.Timestamp
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - SMS fallback number: TIMESTAMP

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_SMSfallback.New_Number
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - SMS fallback number: NEW NUMBER

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_SMSfallback.Old_Number
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - SMS fallback number: OLD NUMBER

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_TestNumber.New_Number
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - test number: NEW NUMBER

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_TestNumber.Old_Number
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - test number: OLD NUMBER

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_TestNumber.Request_From
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - test number: REQUEST FROM

Data.Name: EcallChangeLog_TestNumber.Timestamp
Data.Comment: Ecall change log - test number: TIMESTAMP

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring
Data.Comment: Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring

Data.Name: PUSH_DETECTED.timestamp 1
Data.Comment: Timestamp 1(last time button pushed) string with format dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss

Data.Name: CUSTOMER_REQUEST.Shortpush
Data.Comment: Manual eCall by combination of short push(Bit 1)

Data.Name: PUSH_DETECTED.timestamp 2
Data.Comment: Timestamp 2 (last time button released) string with format dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.NOKtoOK
Data.Comment: Representing last time the A-IVC network status changed from NOK to OK

Data.Name: LAST_CRASH_DETECTED
Data.Comment: Timestamp (last time that an automatic eCall was launched) string with format dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.OKtoNOK
Data.Comment: Representing last time the A-IVC network status changed from OK to NOK

Item.Text: End of Life of the Battery
No automatic eCall has ever been detected before
Not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
Not registered, MS currently searching for a base station
Not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
Not registered, MS currently searching for a base station

Data.Name: Architecture Definition
Data.Comment: This data will be set in Renault Plant in order to identify on which type of car A-IVC is mounted

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Emergency
Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Compatible
Services provisioning.Charge spot short term booking
Services provisioning.Charging historical
Data.Comment: Charging historical (consulting Phone, computer),Battery charging notifications (stop/start/pb)

Data.Name: Services provisioning.GBA.Battery usage & charge history
Data.Comment: GBA : Battery usage & charge history = Health Certificate update 2012

Data.Name: Services provisioning.GBA.Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer doesn’t pay upgrade
Data.Comment: GBA : Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer doesn’t pay upgrade

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Remote HVAC control
Data.Comment: Remote HVAC control (idem PC par badge ; 5 min plug or not)

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone
Data.Comment: Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone

Data.Name: Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out
Data.Comment: Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out

Data.Name: Max Time to Send Random Upload
Data.Comment: Max Time to Send Random Upload

Data.Name: MODIFICATIONS_NUMBER
Data.Comment: Whenever the ECALL_SMS_FALLBACK_NUMBER& ECALL_TEST_NUMBER are changed this DID will get incremented.

Data.Name: ECALL_H_ENTRIES_NUMBER
Data.Comment: Maximum number of Historical Data to be saved

Data.Name: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#1
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#2
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE SC Precond
Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START
Data.Comment: Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START

Item.Text: False (callback request by sms is not allowed)
True (callback request by sms is allowed)
No retry until next ON cycle

Data.Name: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate PROBE Charging status
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivationservice byte.deactivate PROBE Vehicle Status#1
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation service byte.deactivate PROBE Vehicle Status#2
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation service byte.deactivate PROBE SC Precond
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Activation.activate PROBE Charging status

EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate Charge Profile
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate Root Certificate
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate Inmediate Precond
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate Tariff table
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate Contract Certificate
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate SC Precond

EV DAI Services Activation Status.Activation services byte.activate Tariff table
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Activation services byte.activate Contract Certificate
EV DAI Services Activation Status.Activation services byte.activate SC Precond

Data.Comment: Time To Confim Start Infringement For Time Limit

Data.Name: Time To Confirm Stop Infringement For Time Limit
Data.Comment: Time To Confirm Stop Infringement For Time Limit

Data.Name: Time To Confim Start Infringement For Speed Limit
Data.Comment: Time To Confim Start Infringement For Speed Limit

Data.Name: Time To Confirm Stop Infringement For Speed Limit
Data.Comment: Time To Confirm Stop Infringement For Speed Limit

Data.Comment: Time To Confim StartInfringement For Area Limit

Data.Comment: Time To Confirm Stop Infringement For Area Limit

Item.Text: Outgoing MSD by SMS not blocked

Data.Name: KEP server address.URL for KEP(P5) server
Detect Stop Infringement For Time Limit
Data.Comment: Detect Stop Infringement For Time Limit

Data.Name: Detect Stop Infringement For Speed Limit
Data.Comment: Detect Stop Infringement For Speed Limit

Data.Name: Detect Stop Infringement For Area Limit
Data.Comment: Detect Stop Infringement For Area Limit

Item.Text: A-IVC shall follow the switch strategy
A-IVC shall not switch on the BuB

Data.Name: CELLULAR NUMBER OF DATA Rx.Number of datas
Data.Comment: CELLULAR NUMBER OF DATA Rx - Number of datas

Data.Name: CELLULAR NUMBER OF DATA Tx.Number of datas
Data.Comment: CELLULAR NUMBER OF DATA Tx - Number of datas

Data.Name: Routine status_ReqDataChannel
Data.Comment: Staus of Request Data channel Routine

Item.Text: A-IVC not connected to any Data Channel

Data.Name: RoutineStatus.RSSI
Data.Comment: REQUEST GSM NETWORK AND REJECT CAUSES routine Status

Data.Comment: REQUEST GSM NETWORK AND REJECT CAUSES routine Status

Data.Name: RoutineStatus.BER
Data.Comment: REQUEST GSM NETWORK AND REJECT CAUSES routine Status

Data.Name: RoutineStatus.Net Registrationstate
Data.Comment: REQUEST GSM NETWORK AND REJECT CAUSES routine Status

Item.Text: Not registered, ME is not currently searching for a new operator
Not registered, ME currently searching for a new operator

Data.Name: Routinestatus.List of bands supported size (not available in A-IVC 3G)
Data.Comment: List of bands supported size (not available in A-IVC 3G)

Data.Name: Routinestatus.List of bands supported (not available in A-IVC 3G)
Data.Comment: List of bands supported (not available in A-IVC 3G)

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_ GNSS position at eCall launching moment
Data.Comment: GNSS position at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_ Kilometers of the vehicle when the ecall started
Data.Comment: Kilometers of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_Velocity of the vehicle when the ecall started
Data.Comment: Velocity of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_Coverage level at eCall launching moment
Data.Comment: Coverage level at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_eCall started remotely (TRUE) or launched from the vehicle (FALSE)
Data.Comment: eCall started remotely (TRUE) or launched from the vehicle (FALSE)

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_Voice communication was established (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
Data.Comment: Voice communication was established (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_SEND_MSD request was received during the call (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
Data.Comment: SEND_MSD request was received during the call (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_Type of call Automatic (TRUE) or Manual (FALSE)
RoutineStatus_The PSAP acknowledgement was received by the system
Data.Comment: The PSAP acknowledgement was received by the system

Data.Name: RoutineStatus_The MSD was sent during the eCall (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
Data.Comment: The MSD was sent during the eCall (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routineresults.RNQ log as defined in T-C01-01
Data.Comment: RNQ log as defined in T-C01-01

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Year
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC - Year

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Month
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC -Month

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Day
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC - DAy

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Hour
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC - Hour

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Minutes
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC - Minutes

Data.Name: RoutineControlOptionRecord.Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC.Seconds
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) to be written in A-IVC - Seconds

Data.Name: RoutineStatus. Data (A-IVC Time)
Data.Comment: Data (A-IVC Time) for Read request; $00 $00 $00 $00 (Default value) on write request

Data.Name: LED Duty cycle
Data.Comment: CONTROL OF LED ECALL - Duty cycle

Data.Name: LED Duty cycle - Response Read Value
Data.Comment: CONTROL OF LED ECALL - Duty cycle

Data.Name: SET_VEHICLE_SPEED_LIMIT
Data.Comment: SET_VEHICLE_SPEED_LIMIT(Rollover is detected without vehicle speed limit: $00)

Data.Name: ConfMonitoring Upload Period IGN_OFF
Data.Comment: Conf Monitoring upload period IGN - OFF

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Lost communication with Hybrid Electric Vehicle Control

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
